name: Striped Frostsaber
flavor: 'This hearty mount's ferocious appetite earned it the nickname 'Dragon Belly' in the night elf language.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Darnassus (or playing as a night elf). Bought with 1 gold.

name: Striped Nightsaber
flavor: 'Considered one of Azeroth's perfect predators, these agile beasts can sprint through dense forests without making a sound.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Darnassus (or playing as a night elf). Bought with 1 gold.

name: Spotted Frostsaber

name: Swift Stormsaber

name: Swift Frostsaber

name: Swift Mistsaber
flavor: 'Some historians claim that this breed's misty grey coat is the result of ancient Highborne experiments conducted on nightsabers.'

notes: Requires Exalted with either the Kurenai or the Mag'har. Bought with 70 gold.

name: Cenarion War Hippogryph
flavor: 'Members of the Cenarion Circle have shared a long and prosperous partnership with their hippogryph allies. When conflict is unavoidable, the Cenarion War Hippogryph is called into service.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Cenarion Expedition. Bought with 2000 gold.

name: Red Riding Nether Ray
flavor: 'Nether Rays are among the most trusted, versatile mounts in all of Outland and beyond.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Sha'tari Skyguard. Bought with 200 gold.

name: Silver Riding Nether Ray
flavor: 'Nether Rays are among the most trusted, versatile mounts in all of Outland and beyond.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Sha'tari Skyguard. Bought with 200 gold.

name: Purple Riding Nether Ray
flavor: 'Nether Rays are among the most trusted, versatile mounts in all of Outland and beyond.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Sha'tari Skyguard. Bought with 200 gold.

name: Red Drake
flavor: 'You should never listen to minstrels' fancies. A dragon would never hurt a soul, unless they tried to hurt him first'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Wyrmrest Accord. Bought with 2000 gold.

name: Ice Mammoth
flavor: 'Many ice giants claim that they have trained their favored white mammoths to trigger avalanches with their trumpeting calls.'
notes: Requires Revered with the Sons of Hodir. Bought with 1000 gold.

name: Grand Ice Mammoth
flavor: 'Due to high winds and avalanches, the Sons of Hodir recommend bringing at least two companions if venturing into the dangerous Storm Peaks.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Sons of Hodir. Bought with 10000 gold.

name: Invincible
flavor: 'The famous steed of Arthas Menethil, who serves its master in life and in death. Riding him is truly a feat of strength.'
notes: This mount has a drop chance of .01%.

name: Headless Horseman's Mount
flavor: 'Be it into the flood, or into the fire, this one will go where you require.'
notes: This mount has a drop chance of .01% and is only available during the Hallow's End.

name: Azure Drake
flavor: 'Always speak politely to an enraged dragon.'
notes: Can drop simultaneously with the Blue Drake.

name: Blue Drake
flavor: 'Come not between the dragon and his wrath.'
notes: Can drop simultaneously with the Azure Drake.

name: Spectral Tiger
flavor: 'Historians claim that these incorporeal beasts were created when Draenor exploded, unleashing energies that warped the world's flora and fauna.'
notes: Only obtainable with a wow tcg card code, which are no longer in production.

name: Goblin Trike
flavor: 'A compilation of nuts, bolts, gears, and treated wood paneling make for an unusually smooth ride.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Bilgewater Cartel (or playing as a goblin). Bought with 1 gold.

name: Goblin Turbo-Trike
flavor: 'The turbo trike's tri-wheel design adds superior stability and a smaller turn radius over its two wheeled cousins.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Bilgewater Cartel (or playing as a goblin). Bought with 10 gold.

name: Mountain Horse
flavor: 'Images of this breed are often found on kegs of watered-down dwarven brew.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Gilneas (or playing as a worgen). Bought with 1 gold.

name: Swift Mountain Horse
flavor: 'Longs for the day it may return to its home in Gilneas.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Gilneas (or playing as a worgen). Bought with 10 gold.

name: Brown Riding Camel
flavor: Fennimore Quigley is credited with milking the first camel and breaking the record for 'longest unintentional flight,' all in the same afternoon.
notes: Requires Exalted with Ramkahen. Bought with 100 gold.

name: Tan Riding Camel
flavor: 'Fennimore Quigley is credited with milking the first camel and breaking the record for 'longest unintentional flight,' all in the same afternoon.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Ramkahen. Bought with 100 gold.

name: Spectral Steed
flavor: 'Dark spirits flee before the radiance of its presence.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Baradin's Wardens. Bought with 165 Tol Barad Commendation.

name: Spectral Wolf
flavor: 'Fears only fire.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Hellscream's Reach. Bought with 165 Tol Barad Commendation.

name: Drake of the West Wind
flavor: 'Harnessing the elemental powers of the storm, these majestic beasts crackle like lightning and roar like thunder.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Baradin's Wardens or Hellscream's Reach. Bought with 200 Tol Barad Commendation.

notes: Requires Exalted with the Tushui Pandaren or the Huojin Pandaren (or playing as a pandaren). Bought with 1 gold.

notes: Requires Exalted with the Shado-Pan. Bought with 1500 gold.

name: Red Shado-Pan Riding Tiger
flavor: 'When waking a tiger, use a long stick. Better yet, tell your friend to wake the tiger instead.' -Pandaren Proverb
notes: Requires Exalted with the Shado-Pan. Bought with 2500 gold.

name: Golden Cloud Serpent
flavor: 'Golden Cloud Serpents are a treasure to be enjoyed by all who visit the continent of Pandaria.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Order of the Cloud Serpent. Bought with 3000 gold, or get the first one free after hitting Exalted.

name: Jade Cloud Serpent
flavor: 'Jade Cloud Serpents are light and agile; quick and deadly.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Order of the Cloud Serpent. Bought with 3000 gold, or get the first one free after hitting Exalted.

name: Azure Cloud Serpent
flavor: 'Azure Cloud Serpents are believed by the Pandaren to be harbingers of good fortune.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Order of the Cloud Serpent. Bought with 3000 gold, or get the first one free after hitting Exalted.

name: Brown Riding Goat
flavor: 'It takes unflagging patience and a gentle touch to train obstinate mountain goats for riding.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Tillers. Bought with 500 Gold.

name: Black Riding Goat
flavor: 'It takes unflagging patience and a gentle touch to train obstinate mountain goats for riding.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Tillers. Bought with 1500 Gold.

name: White Riding Goat
flavor: 'It takes unflagging patience and a gentle touch to train obstinate mountain goats for riding.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Tillers. Bought with 3250 Gold.

name: Amber Scorpion
flavor: 'The Klaxxi ride massive scorpions into battle against their enemies. A carapace hardened by amber provides superior protection while on the battlefield.'
notes: Requires Exalted with The Klaxxi. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Azure Water Strider
flavor: 'Normally bugs are for bait, but how could you look into its eyes and even think that?' -Nat Pagle
notes: Requires Exalted with The Anglers. Bought with 5000 gold.

name: Thundering August Cloud Serpent
dropped_from: Vendor: Sage Whiteheart or Sage Lotusbloom
flavor: 'From their infancy, Thundering Cloud Serpents are drawn to storms. They have been known to chase lightning through the blackened, roiling clouds, and to bathe in the pouring rain.'
notes: Requires Exalted with The August Celestials. Bought with 10000.

name: Red Flying Cloud
flavor: 'An ancient mogu artifact awarded to those who are deeply committed to the discovery and sharing of Pandaren lore'
notes: Requires Exalted with The Lorewalkers. Bought with 600 gold.

name: Grand Armored Wyvern
flavor: 'This ferocious beast, renowned among wyvern handlers, was one of the first mounts chosen to take part in the Horde's Dominance Offensive.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Dominance Offensive. Bought with 2000 gold.

name: Crimson Primal Direhorn
flavor: 'Leave it to the blood elves to pick the red one.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Sunreaver Onslaught. Bought with 3000 gold.

name: Grand Armored Gryphon
flavor: 'This noble gryphon is as staunch a battle companion as any member of the Alliance could ask for.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Operation: Shieldwall. Bought with 2000 gold.

name: Golden Primal Direhorn
flavor: 'Sharp at both ends and crafty in the middle. Leave it to the trolls to think this was a good idea.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Kirin Tor Offensive. Bought with 3000 gold.

name: Heavenly Golden Cloud Serpent
flavor: 'Warmth and hope emanate from this great creature, which glows like a sunrise over the mountains.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Emperor Shaohao. Bought with 100k Timeless Coin.

name: Swift Frostwolf
flavor: 'Amidst the cold heights of Frostfire, the frostwolves hunt anything they can catch. The fastest among them eat well.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Frostwolf Orcs. Bought with 5000 gold and 5000 apexis crystal.

name: Dusty Rockhide
flavor: 'Ever since acquiring this mount, you have been plagued by strange fever dreams of hippety-hoppety clippety-cloppety elekk on parade.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Council of Exarchs. Bought with 5000 gold and 5000 apexis crystal.

name: Shadowmane Charger
dropped_from: Vendor: Ravenspeaker Skeega or Shadow-Sage Brakoss
flavor: 'Draenei poets have likened this talbuk's coloring to shadows cast by moonlight in an ashen forest.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Arakkoa Outcasts. Bought with 5000 gold and 5000 apexis crystals.

name: Domesticated Razorback
dropped_from: Vendor: Gazrix Gearlock or Mimi Wizzlebub
flavor: 'Domesticated' does not mean 'friendly.' Bring some treats.
notes: Requires Exalted with the Steamwheedle 'Preservation' Society. Bought with 5000 gold and 5000 apexis crystals.

name: Deathtusk Felboar
dropped_from: Vendor: Shadow Hunter Denjai or Vindicator Krethos
flavor: 'Veterans of the battle for Outland's Hellfire Peninsula are traumatized by thoughts of these beasts to this day.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Vol'jin's Headhunters or the Hand of the Prophet. Bought with 2375 gold.

name: Corrupted Dreadwing
flavor: 'Bathed in the blood of demons, these corrupted Dread Ravens are significantly more aggressive, and will often kill one another if kept in confinement.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Order of the Awakened. Bought with 150k apexis crystals.

name: Wild Goretusk
flavor: 'If you want a gentle ride, go find a 'tame happytusk' or something.'
notes: Requires Honored with The Saberstalkers. Bought with 1000 blackfang claws.

name: Bristling Hellboar
flavor: 'The one and only source for the rare culinary ingredient: cursed bacon.'
notes: Requires Exalted with The Saberstalkers. Bought with 5000 blackfang claws.

name: Ivory Hawkstrider
flavor: 'My winged children fill the skies. Not this one though.' -Aviana
notes: Requires Exalted with Talon's Vengeance. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Beryl Ruinstrider
flavor: 'Talbuks, native to Argus, have evolved chitinous plates to survive the decades of ceaseless war that ravages the landscape.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Argussian Reach. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Cerulean Ruinstrider
flavor: 'Talbuks, native to Argus, have evolved chitinous plates to survive the decades of ceaseless war that ravages the landscape.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Argussian Reach. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Umber Ruinstrider
flavor: 'Talbuks, native to Argus, have evolved chitinous plates to survive the decades of ceaseless war that ravages the landscape.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Argussian Reach. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Russet Ruinstrider
flavor: 'Talbuks, native to Argus, have evolved chitinous plates to survive the decades of ceaseless war that ravages the landscape.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Argussian Reach. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Amethyst Ruinstrider
flavor: 'Talbuks, native to Argus, have evolved chitinous plates to survive the decades of ceaseless war that ravages the landscape.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Argussian Reach. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Sable Ruinstrider
flavor: 'Talbuks, native to Argus, have evolved chitinous plates to survive the decades of ceaseless war that ravages the landscape.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Argussian Reach. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Lightforged Warframe
flavor: 'The Army of the Light conducts quick, brutal hit-and-run attacks using these agile war machines.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Army of the Light. Bought with 500k gold.

name: Cloudwing Hippogryph
flavor: 'Moreso than normal hippogryphs, the cloudwings of Azsuna prefer to nest high up in mountain caves far above the cloud line.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Court of Farondis. Paragon reward with a 3% chance to drop.

name: Highmountain Elderhorn
flavor: 'The favored mount of Highmountain hunters, they can easily leap across the rushing rivers of Pinerock Basin even when saddled with a full-sized Tauren.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Highmountain Tribe. Paragon reward with a 7% chance to drop.

name: Leywoven Flying Carpet
flavor: 'The threads are so thin and well-stitched, you can't imagine it wasn't made by magic, strand by strand.'
notes: Requires Exalted with The Nightfallen. Paragon reward with a 3% chance to drop.

name: Valarjar Stormwing
flavor: 'The beating of its wings sound like the rolling of thunder in the distance.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Valarjar. Paragon reward with a 5% chance to drop.

name: Wild Dreamrunner
flavor: 'Dreamrunners flit between this world and the Emerald Dream at will, reveling in their wild nature.'
notes: Requires Exalted with The Dreamweavers. Paragon reward with a 12% chance to drop.

name: Avenging Felcrusher
flavor: 'After Alleria and Turalyon explained the usefulness of the Draenei's long-time companion animal, the Army of the Light brought several into the fold for training.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Army of the Light. Paragon reward with a 4% chance to drop.

name: Blessed Felcrusher
flavor: 'After Alleria and Turalyon explained the usefulness of the Draenei's long-time companion animal, the Army of the Light brought several into the fold for training.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Army of the Light. Paragon reward with a 4% chance to drop.

name: Glorious Felcrusher
flavor: 'After Alleria and Turalyon explained the usefulness of the Draenei's long-time companion animal, the Army of the Light brought several into the fold for training.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Army of the Light. Paragon reward with a 4% chance to drop.

name: Expedition Bloodswarmer
flavor: 'Orphaned during the rout of the Blood Trolls, this bloodswarmer has been retrained by Talanji's handlers.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Talanji's Expedition. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Alabaster Hyena
flavor: 'These hyena are used by the Voldunai to quickly move unseen throughout the sands.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Voldunai. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Cobalt Pterrordax
flavor: 'These pterrordax keep vigil for enemy fleets soaring above the coasts of Zandalar.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Zandalari Empire. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Rubyshell Krolusk
flavor: 'The forsaken prefer the use of these bloodthirsty hunters, both for their speed as a mount, and the psychological effect they have on their enemies.'
notes: Bought with 200 Honorbound Service Medals.

name: Bloodthirsty Dreadwing
flavor: 'The forsaken prefer the use of these bloodthirsty hunters, both for their speed as a mount, and the psychological effect they have on their enemies.'
notes: Bought with 750 Honorbound Service Medals.

name: Smoky Charger
flavor: 'Among the oldest horse breeds in Kul Tiras, they even led many a charge in the original struggle with the drust.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Order of Embers. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Admiralty Stallion
flavor: 'These sleek white stallions are the few mounts allowed to embark on Kul Tiran ships.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Proudmoore Admiralty. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Dapple Gray
flavor: 'A favored mount of the sea priests who call Stormsong home.'
notes: Requires Exalted with the Storm's Wake. Bought with 10k gold.

name: Azureshell Krolusk
flavor: 'Captured from the desolate sands of Vol'dun, this mount is surprisingly docile in captivity.'
notes: Bought with 200 7th Legion Service Medals.

name: Priestess' Moonsaber
flavor: 'Once these elegant cats were only given to high-ranking priestesses of Elune, but now they ride into battle with all manner of champion, in the service of vengeance.'
notes: Bought with 750 7th Legion Service Medals.

name: Flying Machine
flavor: 'The backbone of the Alliance air force is comprised predominantly of gnomish flying machines due to their maneuverability and speed.'
notes: Requires Outland Engineering. Recipe is sold from engineering trainers.

name: Turbo-Charged Flying Machine
flavor: 'Only the most talented engineers have the courage and the mental stamina to create a flying machine that boasts stability and safety. Turbo-charging one is just crazy!'
notes: Requires Outland Engineering. Recipe is sold from engineering trainers.

name: Mechano-Hog
flavor: 'Difficult to build and to maintain, these hogs more than make up for their expense through sheer cool factor.'
notes: Requires Northrend Engineering. Recipe is sold from Skullcrush or Crane for 100 gold.

name: Mekgineer's Chopper
flavor: 'Sporting superb engineering craftsmanship, this chopper is one of the few personal vehicles on Azeroth built for two.'
notes: Requires Northrend Engineering. Recipe is sold from Brighton or Silverstone for 100 gold.

name: Depleted-Kyparium Rocket
flavor: 'When Kyparite is depleted of its amber essence it becomes fairly resistant to the corrosion from rocket fuel.'
notes: Requires Pandaria Engineering. Recipe is sold from engineering trainers.

name: Geosynchronous World Spinner
flavor: 'This rocket was originally designed to speed up the rotation of the world making for shorter nights. Gnomes with insomnia can have lofty goals.'
notes: Requires Pandaria Engineering. Recipe is sold from engineering trainers.

name: Sky Golem
flavor: 'A glorious feat of engineering, the sky golem takes traditional shredder technology to a whole new level (and altitude!).'
notes: Requires Pandaria Engineering. Recipe is dropped randomly from any MoP enemy.

name: Mecha-Mogul Mk2
flavor: 'The Mk2 is an updated design with a focus on comfort and reliability over firepower.'
notes: Requires Kul Tiran Engineering. Recipe is dropped randomly from Mogul Razdunk in the MOTHERLOAD on Mythic.

name: Jade Panther
flavor: 'Legends say that an ancient pandaren emperor crafted the first jeweled panther for his son after the boy's twin brother died of an illness.'
notes: Requires Pandaria Jewelcrafting and Honored with the Order of the Cloud Serpents. Recipe is bought with 200 gold.

name: Sunstone Panther
flavor: 'Legends say that an ancient pandaren emperor crafted the first jeweled panther for his son after the boy's twin brother died of an illness.'
notes: Requires Pandaria Jewelcrafting and Honored with the Order of the Cloud Serpents. Recipe is bought with 200 gold.

name: Sapphire Panther
flavor: 'Legends say that an ancient pandaren emperor crafted the first jeweled panther for his son after the boy's twin brother died of an illness.'
notes: Requires Pandaria Jewelcrafting and Revered with the Order of the Cloud Serpents. Recipe is bought with 200 gold.

name: Ruby Panther
flavor: 'Legends say that an ancient pandaren emperor crafted the first jeweled panther for his son after the boy's twin brother died of an illness.'
notes: Requires Pandaria Jewelcrafting and Revered with the Order of the Cloud Serpents. Recipe is bought with 200 gold.

name: Jeweled Onyx Panther
flavor: 'Trade Prince Gallywix recently ordered dozens of these glittering jewel-encrusted mounts to roam the grounds of his pleasure palace.'
notes: Requires Pandaria Jewelcrafting and Exalted with the Order of the Cloud Serpents. Recipe is bought with 200 gold.

name: Flying Carpet
flavor: 'Hop aboard this flying carpet to see the shining, shimmering, and splendid world of Azeroth, wonder by wonder.'
notes: Requires Northrend Tailoring. Recipe is sold from tailoring trainers.

name: Magnificent Flying Carpet
flavor: 'Standard features include a sturdy imbued frostweave frame and real iceweb spider silk threading. Spare head pillow sold separately.'
notes: Requires Northrend Tailoring. Recipe is sold from tailoring trainers.

name: Frosty Flying Carpet
flavor: 'I remember my first flying carpet... yeti hair and burlap. Not nearly as nice as this one here.' - Frozo the Renowned
notes: Requires Northrend Tailoring. Recipe is sold from Frozo the Renowned for 6 Frozen Orbs.

name: Creeping Carpet
flavor: Can't fly, but can creep very quickly.
notes: Requires Draenor Tailoring. Recipe is taught by tailoring trainers for 5 Secrets of Draenor Tailoring

name: Fossilized Raptor
flavor: 'Legends tell of a spell placed upon a hunting raptor who dared to snarl at young Tyrande Whisperwind as she bathed in a jungle pool. The beast is cursed to wander Azeroth - until it apologizes.'
notes: Requires Archaeology. Has a chance to drop from Fossil Dig Sites

name: Ultramarine Qiraji Battle Tank
flavor: 'The Tol'vir sorcerer Azj'Aqir was said to possess a scepter that would allow him to control a Qiraj battle tank outside of its Silithus home.'
notes: Requires Archaeology. Has a chance to drop from Fossil Dig Sites

name: Spirit of Eche'ro
flavor: 'The spirit of Huln Highmountain's pet moose.'
notes: Requires Archaeology. Mission for mount is on a timed rotation, and stays around for 2 weeks before moving on.

name: Sandstone Drake
flavor: 'Sandstone Drakes were studied in great detail long ago by the famed alchemist Walleye Sprysprocket. It has even been said that Walleye developed potions to mimic the drakes' physiology.'
notes: Requires Cataclysm Alchemy and Archaeology. Recipe is aquired by chance in Canopic Jars.

name: Sea Turtle
flavor: Often caught by fishermen at a young age, these mounts are much more comfortable in the water than they are on land.
notes: This mount may also drop from any pool from Wrath of the Lich King to Mists of Pandaria, with a 1/5000 chance to drop

name: Riding Turtle
flavor: Slow and steady might not always win you the race but it'll get you there... eventually.
notes: This mount is also available as an unavailable code card, in the black market, or in the trading post for 700 Trader's Tender

name: Crimson Water Strider
flavor: 'Normally bugs are for bait, but how could you look into its eyes and even think that?' -Nat Pagle
notes: Major Timesink. Requires Level 3 Fishing Shack and Best Friends with Nat Pagle and costs 100 Nat's Lucky Coins

name: Brinedeep Bottom-Feeder
flavor: These elusive fish prefer to skulk in the deepest reaches of the Great Sea, searching the darkness for food.
notes: Requires Best Friends with Conjurer Margoss and is bought with 100 Drowned Mana

name: Pond Nettle
notes: Requires Fishing. Drop chance is (estimated at) 1 in 500.

name: Great Sea Ray
notes: Requires Fishing. Will likely be a grind

name: Dustmane Direwolf
notes: Requires Draenor Leatherworking. Recipe is taught by leatherworking trainer for 5 Secrets of Draenor Leatherworking.

name: Great Northern Elderhorn
notes: Requires Legion Leatherworkning. Recipe is received from a leatherworking questline.

name: Steelbound Devourer
notes: Requires Legion Blacksmithing. Recipe is dropped from Tichondrius in The Nighthold.

name: Rusted Proto-Drake
dropped_from: Achievement: Glory of the Ulduar Raider (10 player)
notes: No requirements needed, very easy to solo.

name: Ironbound Proto-Drake
dropped_from: Achievement: Glory of the Ulduar Raider (25 player)
notes: No requirements needed, very easy to solo.

name: Bloodbathed Frostbrood Vanquisher
notes: No requirements needed, very easy to solo.

name: Icebound Frostbrood Vanquisher
notes: No requirements needed, very easy to solo.

name: Drake of the East Wind
dropped_from: Achievement: Glory of the Cataclysm Raider
notes: No requirement needed, can be soloed

dropped_from: Achievement: Glory of the Firelands Raider

dropped_from: Achievement: Glory of the Dragon Soul Raider

dropped_from: Achievement: Guild Glory of the Cataclysm Raider

notes: Requires 100 Mounts to be usable on 1 character.

notes: Kill most of the leaders of the opposing faction.

notes: Reward for completing the Hordes Dominance Offensive campaign, which requires getting Exalted with the faction of the same name.

name: Grand Gryphon
notes: Reward for completing the Alliance's Operation: Shieldwall campaign, which requires getting Exalted with the faction of the same name.

notes: Requires Exalted with the Avengers of Hyjal, and then you must complete everything inside the molten front

notes: Collect 35 heirlooms from sources.

notes: Collect 35 heirlooms from sources.

name: Soaring Skyterror

name: Mechanized Lumber Extractor
notes: Requires collecting 300 toys

name: Ratstallion
notes: Loot 20k Sightless Eyes, which drop in the underbelly of Dalaran

name: Pureheart Courser

name: Ironclad Frostclaw
dropped_from: Achievement: Two Sides to Every Tale

name: Darkmoon Dancing Bear
notes: Requires the Darkmoon Island needs to be active. Bought with 180 Darkmoon Prize Tickets.

notes: Requires the Darkmoon Island needs to be active. Bought with 180 Darkmoon Prize Tickets.

notes: Requires the Darkmoon Island needs to be active. Bought with 500 Darkmoon Daggermaws, which are fished around the island.

name: Eclipse Dragonhawk
notes: Requires the Burning Crusade Timewalking. Bought for 5000 timewalking medals

name: Ironbound Wraithcharger
notes: Requires Wrath of the Lich King Timewalking. Bought for 5000 timewalking medals

name: Yu'lei, Daughter of Jade
notes: Requires Mists of Pandaria Timewalking. Bought for 5000 timewalking medals

name: Infinite Timereaver
notes: Requires any Timewalking. Drops from any timewalking boss, does not have to be the last one.

name: Beastlord's Irontusk
notes: Requires Warlords of Draenor Timewalking. Bought for 5000 timewalking medals

name: Beastlord's Warwolf
notes: Requires Warlords of Draenor Timewalking. Bought for 5000 timewalking medals

name: Swift Lovebird
notes: Requires the event 'Love is in the Air'. Bought for 270 love tokens.

name: X-45 Heartbreaker
notes: Requires the event 'Love is in the Air'. Has a chance to drop from Apothecary Hummel once a day.

name: Swift Springstrider
notes: Requires Noblegarden. Bought with 500 noblegarden chocolate.

name: Swift Brewfest Ram
notes: Requires Brewfest. Mounts drop from chest, with a very low chance of dropping both.

name: Great Brewfest Kodo
notes: Requires Brewfest. Mounts drop from chest, with a very low chance of dropping both.

name: Great Brewfest Kodo
notes: Requires Brewfest. Mounts drop from chest, with a very low chance of dropping both.

name: Minion of Grumpus
notes: Requires the event 'Feast of Winter Veil'. Has a very low chance to drop.

name: Venomhide Ravasaur
dropped_from: Quest: They Grow Up So Fast
notes: Requires 20 days of daily missions. After the missions are done, you need to collect and give 20 rugged leather, 20 runecloth, 80 gold and 20 teeth and youll be given a mount

name: Venomhide Ravasaur
dropped_from: Quest: They Grow Up So Fast
notes: Requires 20 days of daily missions. After the missions are done, you need to collect and give 20 rugged leather, 20 runecloth, 80 gold and 20 teeth and youll be given a mount

name: Winterspring Frostsaber
dropped_from: Quest: They Grow Up So Fast
notes: Requires 20 days of daily missions and Exalted with the Winterspring Trainers.

name: Vashj'ir Seahorse
notes: Unlocked in the story of Kelp'thar Forest. Its required to do some optional quests, so its recommended to look up the list of quests to complete.

name: Onyx Cloud Serpent
notes: Requires Exalted with the Shado-Pan and Revered with the Golden Lotus.

name: Bone-White Primal Raptor
dropped_from: Quest: A Mountain of Giant Dinosaur Bones
notes: Requires turning in 9999 dinosaur bones, which are obained from killing enemies on the Isle of Giants.

name: Crimson Deathcharger
notes: Requires killing the Lich King in a party with someone holding Shadowmourne. The person holding Shadowmourne needs to be a Death Knight.

name: Kua'fon
notes: Requires a Horde character to complete 25-30 daily quests.

name: Bruce
notes: The NPC for this quest has been removed from the game, this will be updated if changed.

name: Hearthsteed
notes: Play 3 games of Hearthstone, and win 1 game.

name: Voidtalon of the Dark Star
notes: Requires finding a portal that randomly spawns in any of the WoD zones. These portals spa

name: Fathom Dweller
dropped_from: World Quest: DANGER: Kosumoth the Hungering
notes: Recommended to use a guide for this mount.

name: Llothien Prowler
notes: Recommended to use a guide for this mount.

name: Long-Forgotten Hippogryph
notes: Find 5 of the Ephemeral Crystals in Azsuna, might need a guide to find them out of over 10 spots.

name: Prestigious War Wolf
dropped_from: Achievement: Free For All, More For Me
notes: Complete 4 PvP world quests 20 times each. These quests are on a 3 day rotation, with the 3rd day being all quests are active

name: Prestigious War Steed
dropped_from: Achievement: Free For All, More For Me
notes: Complete 4 PvP world quests 20 times each. These quests are on a 3 day rotation, with the 3rd day being all quests are active

name: Riddler's Mind-Worm
notes: Recommended to use a guide for this mount. NOTE: This mount will not be mailed if you miss looting it. If missed, it will need to be done on another character.

name: Lucid Nightmare
notes: Recommended to use a guide for this mount.

name: Predatory Bloodgazer
